name: Loom
description: Loom lets you record quick video messages of your screen and camera to share with teammates. Popular for async communication, code reviews, design feedback, and replacing long meetings with clear video walkthroughs.
use_cases: Your team works across time zones and you want to replace status meetings with quick recorded walkthroughs
You give frequent design or code review feedback and want to show your screen rather than write long comments
You onboard new hires or customers and want reusable video guides they can watch on demand
You use Slack heavily and want async video messages that embed directly in conversations
